I'm a loyal Morimens player, and there are some areas where the recent anniversary events need improvement. I urge the Biav team to listen to player feedback and avoid such a rushed ending to the second anniversary celebration:

1. Continue the anniversary tradition of giving away +12 limited-edition Destiny Wheels. This is both a tradition and genuinely helpful to players.

2. Add more anniversary events. The current preview events hardly qualify as anniversary events; they're virtually identical to other versions except for the permanent benefits and changes. While the Biav team's optimizations are good, this isn't what an anniversary version should include. Where are the extra anniversary events that should have been included? Please add them back.

3. Make the "Time reversal" feature free. This is a fundamental game feature optimization issue and shouldn't be just a benefit for paying players.

4. Don't just buff the base stats of limited-edition Awakenings; the stats of permanent Awakenings also need strengthening. Increasing stats requires careful consideration, as it could lead to numerical inflation, something players don't want to see.

As players, we genuinely hope that Morimens will continue to improve, but the current state is truly worrying. We sincerely hope that the Biav team can listen to the players' opinions and work together to create a better Morimens. Please!

yes, I worked on beyond the skies translation, but it wasn't very polished back then. I've done another round of edits to be ready by the anniversary<:dishes:1356083313063759922> 
Out of the translated stories currently available in game, I also did Liz's deepdive, Uvhash & Agrippa's Culinary Domination, Doresain's 'Astral Reign' Chapter 3, and the character voice lines.

After reviewing the current chapters 1-5 translation, we've noticed the translation agency tends to over-simplify certain lines. So, while editing Chapters 6-9, I've been focusing on restoring information and polishing the flow to make sure the dialogue sounds more in-character. Meanwhile, my colleague is testing all the story and main-story content in-game to eliminate bugs<:sad:1356085505523187712>

Here's an example of the edits we are doing in-house to improve the translation; (marked for spoiler, chapter 7)
We will be doing story translation ourselves and conduct the opinions of our players more to ensure better quality!

(and i just noticed two of those lines should be past tense because keeper is remembering past events...)
i am trying to be more transparent with our players about the translation. your satisfaction is our priority<:dishes:1356083313063759922>
